TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lewis_Brown, title = Lewis_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lewis_Brown} }

S.FORM: Lewis Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1955 , ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 2, Lewis Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2011) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Lewis Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1955 , ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 2, Lewis Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2011) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lewis~ɕ βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lewis~ɕ βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
